name: Legenda Puteri Qaseh
overview: In the land of Kayajaya, a poor girl with a kind soul name Qaseh discovers that she's the heiress to the late king and queen and must immediately learn the ropes of becoming queen.

trailers.title: LEGENDA PUTERI QASEH | Official Trailer - Lisa Surihani, Yusry, Norman Hakim, Qasrina, Chew Kin Wah
